title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates how Claude Code was used to build a SaaS product that generated $481,000 annually, developed in 45 days with someone having zero coding experience. The video covers five steps for shipping products using Claude Code: starting with the problem, knowing where to engineer versus reuse, learning technical vocabulary, iterating smoothly, and identifying breaking points.
